title: ED Proposes Accountability Framework with Tight Timeline, Expanded Penalties
summary_en: The Department of Education has released its proposed rule on program-level accountability under the One Big Beautiful Bill Act, advancing a framework that would tie federal student aid eligibility to graduate earnings outcomes.
title_cn: 美国教育部拟出台项目级问责框架 时限紧凑处罚范围扩大
